case_title: ANDRES DELOS REYES VS. YOLANDA B FERNANDEZ et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF REYES, ANDRES DELOS ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-30-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-30-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. BOTH DEFENDANTS WAIVE UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY TAGALOG INTERPRETER---MELANIE DE LUNA. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-30-2014 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT GUEVARRA, CARLITO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,800.00 FILED BY REYES, ANDRES DELOS AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, YOLANDA B GUEVARRA, CARLITO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-30-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REYES, ANDRES DELOS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, YOLANDA B GUEVARRA, CARLITO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
